name: Bunker 2322
short_description: A visual novel in a post-apocalyptic setting. Find out what happened to humanity, traveling through the deserted world in search of the main character's family.
detailed_description:
Special Offer


About the Game

"Bunker" is a visual novel set in a world where human civilization has been almost completely destroyed.


The main character wakes up from cryosleep in a secret bunker. She doesn't remember anything about herself or what happened to the world.

Explore the deserted land, meet the few survivors, find the family of the main character!

In this adventure you are waiting for:
  • Multiple endings
  • Multi - faceted characters
  • The developed world
  • A melancholic story about the search for loved ones
  • Illustrations in a unique author's style
